description: Enhance the Products page with better category banners, larger images, equal card heights, Export Grade/Bulk Supply badges, improved spacing, and ensure Rice appears first with largest visual emphasis. Also enhance the Footer with premium export-company styling, company description tagline, and better section organization.
steps: Enhance src/app/products/page.tsx: Add 'Export Grade' and 'Bulk Supply' badge overlays on product cards (positioned in top-right corner of image). Ensure Rice category appears first (already does) and give it larger visual emphasis - make the Rice section header more prominent with a special banner/highlight. Improve card heights to be equal using flex-grow pattern (already partially done, ensure consistency). Add better spacing between sections. Improve category section headers with premium banner styling. Make product images slightly larger or use a better aspect ratio for visual impact.

Enhance src/components/Footer.tsx: Add the company description tagline 'Connecting Quality Indian Agricultural Products with Global Markets' prominently. Keep existing structure but enhance: ensure Quick Links, Product Categories, Certifications, Contact Info, and Social Media are all present and well-organized. Add a 'Request Quotation' CTA button in footer. Improve visual hierarchy with better heading styles. Keep existing StaffArc credit section.
Run npm run build to verify all changes compile correctly
acceptance_criteria: Products page shows 'Export Grade' and 'Bulk Supply' badges on product cards
Rice category appears first with largest visual emphasis (bigger header/banner)
Product cards have equal heights within each category grid
Footer includes tagline 'Connecting Quality Indian Agricultural Products with Global Markets'
Footer has Quick Links, Product Categories, Certifications section, Contact Info, and Social Media links
npm run build completes without errors
verification: Run npm run build in /projects/sandbox/deekshi-global-exim and confirm it completes successfully with no errors
